titles.title: Fill Thou My Life, 0 Lord My God

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Fill Thou my life, 0 Lord my God, In every part with praise, That my whole being may proclaim Thy being and Thy ways.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Not for the lip of praise alone, Nor e’en the praising heart, I ask, but for a life made up Of praise in every part:

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Praise in the common things of life, Its goings out and in; Praise in each duty and each deed, However small and mean.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Fill every part of me with praise Let all my being speak Of Thee and of Thy love, 0 Lord, Poor though I be and weak.
